info.name: Consuelo API
info.description: Postman collection for Consuelo (Twenty CRM fork) API testing. Includes Auth, Voice/Dialer, Contacts, GraphQL Core, Calls+History, and Queue+Analytics endpoints.

exec: // Note: This is a placeholder - actual refresh needs implementation
pm.test('Should return 201 on successful signup', function() {
pm.test('Should contain loginToken in response', function() {

graphql.query: mutation SignUp($email: String!, $password: String!) { signUp(email: $email, password: $password) { loginToken } }

exec: pm.test('Should return 200 on signin challenge', function() {
pm.test('Should contain loginToken in response', function() {
pm.test('Should contain accessToken and refreshToken', function() {

graphql.query: mutation Verify($loginToken: String!) { verify(loginToken: $loginToken) { accessToken refreshToken } }
